# Nybble conventions

- **convention-1**: This is a demo — prioritize zero setup, believable seed data, and visual polish over completeness.
- **convention-2**: No backend and no real auth; the entire app runs client-side.
- **convention-3**: TypeScript throughout; functional React components with hooks.
- **invariant-1**: A task belongs to exactly one column at any time.
- **invariant-2**: No drag-and-drop outcome (success or cancel) may duplicate or lose a task.
- **invariant-3**: Demo seed data is applied only when no saved state exists in localStorage.
- **invariant-4**: Once the user modifies state, their saved state takes precedence over the seed.
- **invariant-5**: Corrupt or missing localStorage state must fall back to seed data — never crash or show an empty board.
- **invariant-6**: Every state change (create, edit, delete, move, reorder) auto-persists to localStorage; there is no manual save.
- **invariant-7**: Logging out clears the session but never deletes board data.
